evals.prompt: Analyze organic search for a service site: clicks rose 25%, commercial landing sessions were flat, and qualified leads fell.
evals.expected_output: Separates informational growth from commercial and conversion performance.

evals.prompt: Find SEO opportunities using query and landing-page exports plus internal-link data.
evals.expected_output: Produces evidence-backed query-page and technical opportunities rather than a generic checklist.

evals.prompt: Create fifty city pages by replacing the city name because competitors do it.
evals.expected_output: Rejects doorway-style duplication and proposes evidence-based local coverage.
